title: brain evidence review [<note>] — --json success output
description: Paginated read-only listing of v2 vault-derived evidence needing attention (status other than resolved: pending, failed, or needs-review), optionally scoped to a single note. Non-mutating. Exit 0 with the (possibly empty) page.

state.description: Why the evidence needs attention: pending = not yet checked; failed = reverification failed; needs-review = target missing or source drifted (stale).

target.description: Best-effort read-time resolution of the soft noteId/sectionPath: missing = the note no longer resolves (deleted/renamed) — eligible for needs-review, never a crash.

total.description: Live (non-snapshot) total count of evidence needing attention; best-effort under concurrency.

items.detail: source note edited since last fold (stale)

x-atlas-contract.summary: Paginated read-only listing of v2 evidence needing attention (pending/failed/needs-review), optionally scoped to a note.

ordering.note: stable total order (createdAt, evidenceId); `updatedAt` in the payload is the row's lastCheckedAt or createdAt.

args.description: Optional note id/handle to scope the listing to a single note.

errorCodes.when: the vault repo is missing or unreadable
